scripts.infra:up: docker compose -f infra/compose/docker-compose.dev.yml up -d postgres redis
scripts.db:generate: bash -lc 'if [ -f .env ]; then dotenv -e .env -- pnpm --filter @typ-nique/db generate; else pnpm --filter @typ-nique/db generate; fi'
scripts.db:migrate: bash -lc 'if [ -f .env ]; then dotenv -e .env -- pnpm --filter @typ-nique/db migrate; else pnpm --filter @typ-nique/db migrate; fi'
scripts.db:deploy: bash -lc 'if [ -f .env ]; then dotenv -e .env -- pnpm --filter @typ-nique/db deploy; else pnpm --filter @typ-nique/db deploy; fi'
scripts.db:seed:content: bash -lc 'if [ -f .env ]; then dotenv -e .env -- pnpm --filter @typ-nique/db seed:content; else pnpm --filter @typ-nique/db seed:content; fi'
scripts.db:seed: bash -lc 'if [ -f .env ]; then dotenv -e .env -- pnpm --filter @typ-nique/db seed; else pnpm --filter @typ-nique/db seed; fi'
scripts.test:checker: pnpm --dir packages/checker exec vitest run --config vitest.config.ts
scripts.test:api:unit: pnpm --dir apps/api exec vitest run --config vitest.unit.config.ts
scripts.test:api:integration: pnpm --dir apps/api exec vitest run --config vitest.integration.config.ts
scripts.test:web: pnpm --dir apps/web exec vitest run --config vitest.config.ts
scripts.docker:build: pnpm docker:build:api && pnpm docker:build:web && pnpm docker:build:worker
scripts.ci:test:unit: pnpm test:checker && pnpm test:api:unit && pnpm test:web
scripts.ci:verify: pnpm ci:lint && pnpm ci:typecheck && pnpm ci:test:unit && pnpm ci:test:integration && pnpm ci:build
